text:
This is primarily a bugfix release.  Note that because of the shared library version bump, the following ports will require Makefile changes:

astro/orsa
audio/snd
benchmarks/sipp
biology/adun
graphics/qgis
graphics/ocropus
mail/bogofilter
math/PDL
math/asymptote
math/labplot
math/orpie
math/p5-Math-GSL
math/py-gsl
math/qtiplot
math/ruby-gsl
math/yacas
math/octave-forge-gsl
misc/kdeedu4
science/abinit
science/getdp
science/gnudatalanguage
science/gromacs
science/kst
science/py-mlpy
